category_sources: Official wazero site describes wazero as a WebAssembly runtime.
source_facts.description says wazero is a zero dependency WebAssembly runtime.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official wazero site.
source_facts.name gives the project name as wazero.
docs_sources: Official wazero website provides dedicated documentation at /docs/.
source_facts.repo points to the official repository whose README supplements the docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/tetratelabs/wazero, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: Official wazero documentation describes the Go developer focus and WebAssembly runtime use.
